name: Highlight Reel
description: TV segment narrative outcomes affecting Grudge and TV Grades

entries.templateText: The arena lights drop to pitch black and FAVORED makes a shocking, unannounced return from injury, sending the crowd into an absolute frenzy.
FAVORED bursts through the crowd during a standard match, marking an explosive return from suspension to clear the ring.
An iconic theme song echoes out of the PA system as FAVORED steps onto the stage after months away, shocking the wrestling world.
FAVORED hits the ring disguised as a camera operator, pulling off their mask to reveal their return by blindsiding UNDERDOG.
FAVORED stands on the entrance ramp, pointing directly at the championship banner to declare their long-awaited return to active competition.
FAVORED returns during an interview segment, silently walking down the ramp to lock eyes with an incredibly stunned UNDERDOG.
The countdown clock expires and FAVORED makes an unadvertised return, completely changing the landscape of the main event picture.
FAVORED makes a dramatic return via the arena rafters, dropping down to rescue UNDERDOG from an overwhelming numbers game.
A sleek vignette concludes with FAVORED stepping through the curtain, marking a high-profile, incredibly hyped roster debut.
FAVORED makes an unannounced debut from the developmental brand, instantly laying out UNDERDOG with a thunderous signature strike.
The international standout FAVORED debuts by walking right down to ringside and staring intensely at the reigning champion.
FAVORED debuts by hijacking the microphone during a commercial break, cutting an incredibly sharp promo that introduces their persona.
A mysterious, highly stylized entrance video plays as FAVORED makes an ominous main roster debut that leaves the arena completely silent.
FAVORED makes a surprise debut by interrupting a standard squash match, annihilating both competitors to make an immediate statement.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG sit across from each other, calmly signing the contract for their upcoming championship match before shaking hands.
The contract signing quickly breaks down; FAVORED hoists UNDERDOG up and drives them directly through the mahogany table.
FAVORED signs the contract with their own blood, presenting a terrifying visual display of psychological warfare to UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG signs the document, but FAVORED flips the heavy table directly onto them, initiating a chaotic, wild ringside brawl.
FAVORED refuses to sign the contract, ripping the paperwork to shreds right in front of an incredibly frustrated UNDERDOG.
FAVORED locks UNDERDOG inside a submission hold right on top of the unsigned contract, forcing an executive official to intervene.
An executive official presents FAVORED with a brand-new, customized championship belt during a lavish, pyro-heavy ring ceremony.
FAVORED is celebrating their new title when UNDERDOG drops from the ceiling, snatching the gold away before sprinting into the crowd.
FAVORED hosts a massive title presentation filled with balloons and champagne, completely mocking the hard work of UNDERDOG.
During a championship presentation, UNDERDOG walks out and uses a spray can to deface the new title belt held by FAVORED.
FAVORED hits a brutal low blow on the legend presenting the championship belt, drawing intense, deafening heat from the live arena.
FAVORED stops their own title ceremony to call out UNDERDOG, demanding they look directly at the gold they will never win.
FAVORED approaches the guardrail, taking off their signature sunglasses and handing them directly to a crying child in the front row.
FAVORED slaps a cup of soda out of a fan's hand, actively berating the ringside crowd until arena security forces them back.
FAVORED celebrates a massive victory by jumping deep into the crowd, surfing the wave of ecstatic fans at ringside.
FAVORED gets right into the face of a vocal fan, using their microphone to completely humiliate them on live international television.
FAVORED pulls an enthusiastic fan over the guardrail to dance in the ring, creating a highly memorable, feel-good television moment.
FAVORED uses an innocent fan as a human shield to successfully dodge a flying crossbody attempt from a desperate UNDERDOG.
The TitanTron screen flashes to a dark, hidden camera feed showing FAVORED systematically destroying the locker room of UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG cuts a live video promo from a remote hospital bed, vowing absolute, unmitigated vengeance against a smirking FAVORED.
FAVORED plays exclusive, highly embarrassing archival training footage on the big screen to completely ruin the segment of UNDERDOG.
The big screen reveals a shocking live parking lot feed showing FAVORED getting jumped by a masked group of rogue individuals.
FAVORED hacks the arena broadcast signal, playing an ominous video message that counts down the exact days left in the career of UNDERDOG.
A mysterious satellite broadcast interrupts the show, revealing that FAVORED has been secretly communicating with a rival promotion's management.
FAVORED storms down to the ring in civilian clothes, grabs a microphone, and issues an open, impromptu challenge to anyone in the back.
FAVORED challenges UNDERDOG to a match right this second, catching UNDERDOG completely off-guard as referees rush to start the bout.
UNDERDOG answers an open challenge from FAVORED, charging down the ramp to start an incredibly fast-paced, unscheduled television match.
FAVORED lays out an impromptu challenge, but aggressively attacks UNDERDOG during their entrance before the bell can officially ring.
FAVORED issues an impromptu challenge, then immediately chickens out and leaves the arena the moment UNDERDOG steps onto the stage.
A mainstream Hollywood action movie star sits front row, standing up to cheer loudly as FAVORED executes their signature pose.
FAVORED gets physical with a guest celebrity musician at ringside, causing a massive mainstream media moment as security separates them.
A champion professional athlete from the local city team steps over the guardrail to hand a weapon directly to UNDERDOG.
FAVORED insults a guest celebrity chef sitting at ringside, getting a face full of food in a highly embarrassing televised botch.
FAVORED manages to convince a guest celebrity influencer to join their faction, creating an incredibly polarizing pop-culture alliance.
The live crowd begins a deafening, unified chant that completely drowns out the scripted, corporate promo being delivered by FAVORED.
The arena audience initiates a massive, synchronized crowd wave, completely ignoring a highly flat, unengaging segment featuring FAVORED.
An organic, stadium-wide chant for UNDERDOG forces FAVORED to break character and visually lose their temper in the center of the ring.
The crowd violently boos a forced corporate announcement by FAVORED, completely hijacking the television segment with intense hostility.
A bizarre, funny crowd chant goes highly viral online, instantly turning a standard mid-card promo by FAVORED into a memorable segment.
The arena lights totally fail during a promo, and the crowd uses their cell phone flashlights to create a breathtaking visual spectacle for FAVORED.
A massive backstage brawl between multiple factions spills right into the arena, completely disrupting the ongoing interview of FAVORED.
The stable representing FAVORED completely cuts off the power grid to the arena, executing a brutal, pitch-black ambush on UNDERDOG.
FAVORED has their promo completely disrupted by a shower of red liquid pouring down from the arena ceiling, destroying their expensive suit.
An invading stable from a rival wrestling company jumps the barricade, completely ruining the high-profile segment of FAVORED.
FAVORED sees their in-ring celebration completely ruined when a rogue truck crashes directly into the staging area backstage.
FAVORED goes on a highly emotional, unscripted rant against management, dropping the microphone and walking out as the segment ends early.
FAVORED presents a spectacular, highly coordinated fireworks display to open the broadcast, instantly setting an energetic tone for the night.
FAVORED is brutally attacked by a masked assailant during a routine commercial break, leaving them bleeding heavily on the entrance ramp.
FAVORED brings out a legendary Hall of Famer to announce them as their new official manager, creating an iconic television image.
FAVORED stumbles over their lines badly during an intense promo, leading to a loud, embarrassing 'You botched it!' chant from the arena.
FAVORED targets the local sports team of the host city, causing an immediate, incredibly hostile wave of uniform boos.
FAVORED cuts a deeply moving, completely genuine promo about their real-life recovery journey, gaining massive universal respect.
FAVORED acts incredibly arrogant, throwing their official merchandise directly into a nearby ringside trash can while laughing.
UNDERDOG uses a massive steel pipe to smash up the luxury sports car belonging to FAVORED live in the arena parking lot.
FAVORED enters the arena riding a massive, high-powered military vehicle, generating a truly unforgettable visual entrance.
An intense, multi-man locker room brawl requires the active intervention of the entire local police force to separate FAVORED and UNDERDOG.
FAVORED stands victoriously on top of a 15-foot ladder center ring, holding a briefcase high as pyro explodes directly behind them.
FAVORED completely refuses to compete in their scheduled match, walking out of the building to a cascade of heavy arena boos.
FAVORED completely saves a failing, low-energy segment by executing a spectacular, unscripted dive off the top of the video screen.
FAVORED targets the elderly, beloved broadcast commentator at ringside, flipping their desk over in a disgusting display of power.
UNDERDOG introduces a highly popular, returning gimmick persona from their past, blowing the roof completely off the live stadium.
FAVORED gets trapped inside a descending steel cage while a vengeful UNDERDOG slowly walks down the ramp carrying a heavy weapon.
FAVORED throws an incredible, massive celebration party featuring live musical performers, completely elevating the production level of the show.
FAVORED hits a brutal running dropkick that sends UNDERDOG crashing directly through the thick plastic protective ringside barricade.
FAVORED delivers a highly memorable, legendary comedic insult that instantly trends worldwide, completely ruining the serious persona of UNDERDOG.
FAVORED stands completely alone in the center of a dark ring as a single spotlight focuses on them, cementing their status as the face of the brand.
